Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.
